message:
fix(e2e): fix mobile viewport test failures and flakiness

- Fix bottom tab bar selector to match BottomNav component (was looking for
  unused BottomTabBar's data-tab-bar attribute)
- Scope desktop nav link assertions to header nav to avoid strict mode
  violation from duplicate footer links
- Dismiss onboarding modal in beforeEach to prevent test interference
- Scope card stacking test to #prompts-section to skip featured horizontal scroll
- Update stale selectors: Workflows→Pricing, Go Pro link→button
- Increase hamburger/tab bar visibility timeouts from 1s to 5s for hydration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
